# Updated 2026-04-25: removed suites not discoverable from button_pattern.cpp
# via the selector's current matching logic (common_seven_attrs without button
# token, indirect dependents like StateManagement, scroll, layout, gestureGroup,
# panGesture, accessibilityDescription, backgroundImagePosition/Size,
# backgroundBlurStyle, foregroundBlurStyle, mouseResponseRegion, touchable).
